statement: The domain/runs package should be normalized around explicit read-service, write-repo, and pure-materializer roles, including renaming experiments_data.ts and bundle_plan_logic.ts to match what they actually do.
rationale: Current names understate real responsibility boundaries and hide mixed modules that blend persistence with orchestration.
keyAssumptions: A clearer naming and file-boundary model will materially improve maintainability and observability.
validationCriteria: Each renamed/split module maps cleanly to one role: read service, repo, or pure algorithm.
Public Lab and worker call sites become easier to trace to their owning layer.
critiquePoints: Some modules may still need to stay co-located for performance or query-shape reasons.
questions: Should read-model aggregation live in *service.ts or *read.ts / *queries.ts?
